g.text: 岩 性 描 述
Grey oolitic limestone with trilobite fragments
Black carbonaceous shale with Chengjiang-type fossils
Grey-black siliceous shale with small shelly fossils
Dark grey phosphatic limestone with SSF assemblages
Light grey thick-bedded dolomite with Cloudina fossils
Grey-white massive dolomite with chert nodules
Dark grey dolomitic shale with Doushantuo-type acritarchs
Yanjiahe Section — Ediacaran-Cambrian Boundary | 总厚 800m | 8 层 | 比例尺 1:3,149
